questionText: Does your organization include covenants in financing agreements to reflect and enforce your environmental policies?
questionKo: 귀사는 자금 조달 계약에 귀사의 환경 정책을 반영하고 시행하기 위한 규약을 포함합니까?
simpleHelp: Banks can influence their clients through requirements within the terms of financing agreements and with the option of a default being triggered should there be a failure to comply. Data users are interested in whether banks are using this method to promote action on environmental performance because there are potential benefits for the bank including a perceived improvement in credit profile and access to alternative pools of capital.

columns.text: Covenants included in financing agreements to reflect and enforce policies
options: No, but we plan to within the next two years
No, and we do not plan to in the next two years
optionsKo: 아니요, 하지만 향후 2년 이내에 진행할 계획입니다

columns.text: Primary reason for not including covenants in financing agreements
options: Lack of internal resources, capabilities, or expertise (e.g., due to organization size)
Judged to be unimportant or not relevant
optionsKo: 내부 자원, 역량 또는 전문성 부족(예: 조직 규모로 인해)

columns.text: Explain why your organization does not include covenants in financing agreements
columns.textKo: 설명 이유 귀사가 아님 포함 금융활동

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Yes" in column 1 "Activity undertaken" for the row "Banking" in 1.10.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

guidance.text:
Primary reason for not including environmental covenants in financing agreements (column 2) 
This column is only presented if any "No…" option is selected in column 1 "Covenants included in financing agreements to reflect and enforce policies".
Explain why your organization does not include covenants in financing agreements (column 3) 
This column is only presented if any "No…" option is selected in column 1 "Covenants included in financing agreements to reflect and enforce policies".
Briefly describe the reasons why your financing agreements do not include environmental covenants.
If you plan to include environmental covenants in the next two years, highlight the key actions you plan to take.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 위 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

guidance.text: Banks have covenants in financing agreements to reinforce environmental policies.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

guidance.text: Financing agreements: legal documents defining the terms and conditions of a financing product or service between your organization, for example as lender, and your client, for example as borrower.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항에서 사용하는 주요 용어의 의미를 설명합니다. 용어 해석은 CDP 2026 원문과 국문 양식의 용어 사용을 우선 적용하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'Covenants included in financing agreements to reflect and enforce policies' NOT completed - 0/6 points
A maximum of 0/6 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Awareness points.
Any option excluding 'No, and we do not plan to in the next two years' selected in column 'Covenants included in financing agreements to reflect and enforce policies' - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'Covenants included in financing agreements to reflect and enforce policies' NOT completed - 0/2 points
A maximum of 0/2 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Full Awareness points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
ROUTE A)
'Yes' selected in column 'Covenants included in financing agreements to reflect and enforce policies' - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'No, but we plan to within the next two years' selected in column 'Covenants included in financing agreements to reflect and enforce policies' - 0/1 points
A maximum of 0/1 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
'No, and we do not plan to in the next two years' selected in column 'Covenants included in financing agreements to reflect and enforce policies' - 0/2 points
A maximum of 0/2 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'Covenants included in financing agreements to reflect and enforce policies' NOT completed - 0/2 points
A maximum of 0/2 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

sourceInfo.name: CDP Full Corporate Questionnaire and Reporting Guidance 2026
sourceInfo.nameKo: CDP 2026 전체 기업 문항 및 보고 가이던스

sourceInfo.name: CDP Climate Change Scoring Essential Criteria 2026

simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 '귀사는 자금 조달 계약에 귀사의 환경 정책을 반영하고 시행하기 위한 규약을 포함합니까?'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. CDP 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
translationSourceKo: 2025 CDP 국문 양식 및 2026 CDP 원문 기준 국문 보정
